message:
feat(workflows/handlers): tick 216 HandleOnErrorCassSearch::execute_step_cx override + lookup_cass_hints_with_cx helper (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Third per-impl Workflow migration. HandleOnErrorCassSearch has the
same shape as HandleSessionStartContext (tick 215): cooldown check
read + cass lookup helper + audit record write. The tick adds the
same two pieces:

1. **`lookup_cass_hints_with_cx(cx, storage, pane_id, trigger)`**:
   cx-first sibling. Routes:
   - `storage.get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` for pane lookup
   - `cass.search_with_cx(cx, query, &options)` for each candidate
   - **Per-query `cx.checkpoint()`** inside the query-candidate
     loop so cancel fired during a previous cass subprocess call
     lands BEFORE the next candidate's full timeout starts.

2. **`execute_step_cx` override** on HandleOnErrorCassSearch:
   - Step 0: `storage.get_audit_actions_with_cx(cx, query)`
   - Step 1: `lookup_cass_hints_with_cx(cx, &storage, pane_id, &trigger)`
   - Step 1: `storage.record_audit_action_with_cx(cx, audit)`
   - Pre-step `cx.checkpoint()` between steps

Legacy paths (`execute_step`, `lookup_cass_hints`) preserved
verbatim.

Tracing annotation: `explicit_cx = true` field added to info/warn/
error spans.

Verification: 1168 / 1168 workflows:: tests pass under
--features asupersync-runtime via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang,
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Per-impl Workflow migration progress: 3/8+ handlers.rs impls:
- ✅ HandleSessionEnd (tick 214)
- ✅ HandleSessionStartContext (tick 215)
- ✅ HandleOnErrorCassSearch (this, tick 216)
- HandleSwarmLearningIndex (next)
- HandleAuthRequired / HandleClaudeCodeLimits / HandleGeminiQuota
- HandleProcessTriageLifecycle (most complex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
